name: commit message validator requires a Decision trailer when the commit touches an ADR-tracked area
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q && touch architectural.txt && git add . && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit -q -m "change") && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/git/validate-commit-trailer.sh" --root repo --require-decision-on-paths architectural.txt 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing_decision_trailer' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
